target_user: Compliance Officers, needing auditable trails for AI decisions and data handling under new regulations; mission-critical, high budget.
monetization: compliance reports generated, data volume audited, enterprise licensing
reason: Looming EU AI Act enforcement will drive demand for auditable AI context and decision logging in regulated industries.

target_user: Data Scientists, looking to integrate real-time enterprise data into LLM applications for better accuracy and freshness; high value for business intelligence.
monetization: data volume processed, query complexity tier
reason: Increased enterprise adoption of real-time AI assistants necessitates robust, dynamic RAG on streaming proprietary data sources.

target_user: Supply Chain Managers, needing real-time adjustments to logistics and inventory; critical for avoiding disruptions and optimizing costs.
monetization: per transaction volume, supply chain network size
reason: Seasonal demand spikes (e.g., back-to-school preparations) and global events necessitate real-time, context-aware supply chain adjustments.

target_user: Security Analysts, focused on rapid incident response and threat hunting; critical for minimizing breaches.

reason: Increasingly sophisticated cyber threats and new threat intelligence platforms demand rapid contextualization for AI-driven SecOps.

target_user: SRE/DevOps Engineers, reducing MTTR for complex incidents; crucial for maintaining service levels and customer trust.
